goal: Turn concept-note diagnosis into proof-based concept verification.
student_facing_changes: Show proof-based concept diagnosis before teacher/debug data.
Replace definition-only tasks with condition, non-condition, counterexample, comparison, and proof tasks.
Use rational/irrational number specific proof tasks when relevant terms are detected.
worker_changes: Analyze prompt now evaluates proof possibility as the key indicator of mathematical understanding.
Verification prompt requires proof-based question sets.
Fallback questions include rational/irrational proof tasks when unit signals match.
